landing.subtitle: Jai Gurubande — A Sacred Digital Space for Inner Peace, Spiritual Growth, and Divine Connection
landing.para1: This platform brings devotees, seekers, and visitors closer to the divine teachings of Guruji and the serene life of the ashram. Whether you are beginning your spiritual journey or deepening your practice, Jai Gurubande offers a calm and welcoming place to learn, reflect, and stay connected.
landing.para2: Experience soulful satsang sessions, devotional bhajans, and daily spiritual guidance that uplift the heart and calm the mind. Stay updated with upcoming programs, special events, sacred dates, and live spiritual gatherings.
landing.para3: Explore the beauty of ashram life and the global mission of Guruji — inspiring blogs, divine moments, photo galleries, heartfelt testimonials, books, international centers, and community initiatives that reflect devotion, service, and unity.
landing.para4: By creating an account, you can personalize your spiritual journey, follow meaningful updates, participate actively in programs, and stay connected through one trusted and peaceful platform.
landing.footer_note: Jai Gurubande · Sanatan Dharma · Seva · Satsang

loading.sub: In surrender, there is peace, there is the Divine.

hero.sq1: The soul is neither born, nor does it die at any time. It is unborn, eternal, ever-existing and primeval.
hero.sq2: Guru Govind dono khade, kake laagoon paay. Balihari Guru aapne, Govind diyo batay.
hero.sq3: In the repetition of the divine name lies the secret to silencing the restless mind and opening the heart.
hero.sq4: Seva — selfless service — is the highest worship. Give without expectation, love without condition.
hero.sq5: Satsang transforms hearts. The company of the enlightened is the fastest boat across the ocean of illusion.
hero.sq6: Dhyan is not emptiness — it is the fullness of pure, undistracted awareness resting in the divine.
hero.sq7: When meditation is mastered, the mind is unwavering like the flame of a lamp in a windless place.
hero.sq8: You have the right to perform your duty, but not to the fruits of your actions.
hero.sq9: Set thy heart upon thy work, but never on its reward.
hero.sq10: A person is said to be elevated who is not disturbed by happiness and distress.
hero.hero_line1: Param Sant Swami Jai Gurubande Ji Maharaj
hero.hero_line2: Let's Move Towards God And Understand Sanatan Dharma.
hero.hero_line3: It's a spiritual and philosophical message encouraging people to seek divine connection and explore the essence of Sanatan Dharma.
hero.ulat_p1: Ulat-Bhaidni reveals hidden spiritual truths through symbolic and paradoxical expressions, guiding the seeker beyond ordinary understanding.
hero.ulat_p2: These mystical expressions encourage seekers to look beyond literal meanings and experience deeper spiritual realization.
hero.about_p1: Guruji is a spiritual guide devoted to spreading wisdom, positivity, and inner peace. Through teachings rooted in ancient traditions and practical life values, Guruji inspires individuals to lead a balanced, meaningful, and conscious life.
hero.about_p2: With compassion and clarity, Guruji emphasizes self-discipline, devotion, and service to humanity. Thousands of followers have found direction, strength, and purpose through Guruji's guidance.
hero.dhyan_p1: Under the divine guidance of Guruji, our Dhyan program leads seekers into the stillness of pure awareness — silencing the restless mind and awakening the inner light of the soul.
hero.dhyan_p2: Join thousands of devotees who have transformed their lives through the sacred practice of meditation rooted in Sanatan Dharma.
hero.mission_text: To spread the eternal wisdom of Sanatan Dharma and guide individuals toward spiritual awareness, righteous living, and inner peace.
hero.vision_text: To build a spiritually awakened society where ancient Dharma values blend harmoniously with modern life for unity and growth.
hero.update1_desc: Swami Ji will be visiting Varanasi and Hyderabad this month. Devotees are requested to stay connected for darshan updates.
hero.update2_desc: Join our live satsang every Sunday at 7:30 PM IST and receive divine guidance and blessings.
hero.update3_desc: UPI & QR-based contribution options are now available for devotees to support spiritual activities.
hero.act1_desc: Daily and regular spiritual, social, and seva-based activities conducted with devotion and discipline.
hero.act2_desc: Special programs, celebrations, satsangs, yatras, and spiritual gatherings throughout the year.
hero.act3_desc: By Guruji's grace, free paralysis treatment is provided at our ashram as a service (Seva) for devotees and those in need.
hero.act4_desc: Website services, announcements, updates, and digital access to spiritual resources.

about.intro_heading: In the Light of Guruji's Grace
about.intro_sub: "This ashram is not just a place — it is a presence."
about.s1_p1: Guruji's life is a sacred journey of devotion, wisdom, and service to humanity...
about.s1_p2: Through years of meditation, study of scriptures, and divine experiences, Guruji blossomed into a beacon of spiritual knowledge...
about.s1_p3: Today, countless seekers look to him for guidance. His life reminds us that true greatness lies not in wealth or recognition, but in humility, compassion, and surrender to the Divine will.
about.s2_p1: The Ashram is not merely a place; it is a living sanctuary where seekers find peace, purpose, and spiritual nourishment...
about.s2_p2: Rooted deeply in the timeless wisdom of the Vedanta, the Ashram reminds every soul that the Divine exists equally in all beings...
about.s2_p3: Above all, the Ashram's values inspire seekers to live with integrity, compassion, and gratitude, transforming daily life into a spiritual journey.
about.s3_p1: The rhythm of the Ashram flows in harmony with nature and the Divine. Each day begins before sunrise...
about.s3_p2: The mornings are often filled with study of scriptures, discourses, and selfless service...
about.s3_p3: Evenings in the Ashram are illuminated by satsangs, bhajans, and meditation...
about.s4_p1: Guruji's teachings are timeless treasures of wisdom, guiding seekers toward self-realization and compassion...
about.s4_p2: His discourses often highlight the importance of balancing worldly duties with spiritual practices...
about.s4_p3: These teachings continue to inspire countless souls, guiding them to find strength in challenges, peace in silence, and purpose in service.
about.s5_p1: Seva, or selfless service, is the heartbeat of the Ashram...
about.s5_p2: Beyond the Ashram walls, seva extends to society through food distribution, health camps, and education programs...
about.s5_p3: Guruji often says, 'The hands that serve are holier than the lips that pray.'
about.s6_p1: The Ashram is filled with colors of joy during spiritual festivals — celebrated with prayers, music, and community feasts...
about.s6_p2: Festivals here are not just about rituals; they are opportunities to experience the Divine in togetherness...
about.s6_p3: These celebrations remind us that spirituality is not a solitary journey but a shared path...

ashramVision.title: Ashram Vision
ashramVision.subtitle: A sacred journey towards faith, discipline, and self-realization
ashramVision.guruji_text: Guided by the divine wisdom and blessings of Guruji
ashramVision.p1: The vision of the Ashram is to create a peaceful spiritual space where seekers can grow in faith, discipline, and self-realization under the guidance of Guruji.
ashramVision.p2: The Ashram aims to spread love, compassion, and inner harmony by encouraging a life rooted in devotion, service, and truth.
ashramVision.p3: Guided by Guruji's teachings, the Ashram works to uplift individuals and society through spiritual practices, satsangs, seva activities, and moral values—helping people live a balanced and meaningful life.
ashramVision.v2_text: Selfless service as a path to inner purification
ashramVision.v3_text: Living with kindness, love, and empathy
ashramVision.v4_text: Walking the righteous path with integrity
ashramVision.quote: When the soul is peaceful, life becomes divine.

dailyTeachings.title: Daily Teaching
dailyTeachings.tag: Guruji's Wisdom · One Day at a Time
dailyTeachings.msg_text: Walk the path of truth with patience and devotion. Every step taken with faith brings you closer to inner peace.
dailyTeachings.q1: What is the true purpose of human life?
dailyTeachings.a1: According to Guruji's teachings, the true purpose of human life is self-realization, inner purification, and union with the divine through devotion, discipline, and service.
dailyTeachings.q2: Why is devotion important in spiritual life?
dailyTeachings.a2: Devotion softens the heart and creates a direct connection with the divine. Guruji teaches that sincere devotion brings peace, clarity, and grace.
dailyTeachings.q3: What does seva mean in the ashram?
dailyTeachings.a3: Seva means selfless service performed without ego or expectation. In the ashram, seva purifies the mind and strengthens spiritual discipline.
dailyTeachings.q4: How does silence help spiritual growth?
dailyTeachings.a4: Silence calms the mind and allows inner awareness to grow. Guruji emphasizes silence as a doorway to deeper meditation.
dailyTeachings.q5: What is the role of discipline in spiritual practice?
dailyTeachings.a5: Discipline creates stability in life. Guruji teaches that regular practice leads to inner strength and steady progress.
dailyTeachings.a6: Uncontrolled desires disturb peace. Guruji guides that moderation and contentment lead to lasting happiness.
dailyTeachings.a7: True faith is unwavering trust in the divine path shown by the Guru, even during difficulties.
dailyTeachings.a8: Meditation purifies thoughts, reduces suffering, and awakens inner joy, as taught by Guruji.
dailyTeachings.q9: Why is humility essential on the spiritual path?
dailyTeachings.a9: Humility removes ego and opens the heart to divine wisdom.
dailyTeachings.q10: What is the meaning of surrender?
dailyTeachings.a10: Surrender means trusting the divine will completely and letting go of fear and control.
dailyTeachings.a11: Guruji teaches that difficulties are lessons meant to strengthen faith and patience.
dailyTeachings.a12: Gratitude keeps the mind positive and attracts divine grace.
dailyTeachings.a13: True happiness comes from inner peace, not from external possessions.
dailyTeachings.a14: Satsang uplifts consciousness and keeps one aligned with truth.
dailyTeachings.q15: How does the Guru guide a seeker?
dailyTeachings.a15: The Guru removes ignorance and shows the path through wisdom and compassion.
dailyTeachings.q16: What is the power of chanting?
dailyTeachings.a16: Chanting purifies the mind and invokes divine vibrations.
dailyTeachings.a17: Patience allows spiritual growth to unfold naturally.
dailyTeachings.a18: Inner purity means freedom from negative thoughts and selfish intentions.
dailyTeachings.q19: Why is simplicity encouraged in the ashram?
dailyTeachings.a19: Simplicity reduces distractions and enhances spiritual focus.
dailyTeachings.a20: Self-awareness is the ability to observe thoughts and actions consciously.
dailyTeachings.a21: Compassion expands the heart and brings one closer to divine love.
dailyTeachings.a22: Consistent practice creates deep spiritual transformation.
dailyTeachings.a23: Detachment means living in the world without being bound by it.
dailyTeachings.a24: Truthfulness strengthens integrity and inner peace.
dailyTeachings.a25: Ego blocks spiritual growth and creates separation.
dailyTeachings.a26: Divine grace is the unseen support that guides and protects the seeker.
dailyTeachings.a27: Forgiveness frees the heart from pain and resentment.
dailyTeachings.a28: Inner strength comes from faith, discipline, and devotion.
dailyTeachings.a29: Self-control brings clarity, balance, and peace.
dailyTeachings.q30: What is the ultimate teaching of Guruji?
dailyTeachings.a30: Live with love, truth, devotion, and selfless service.

satguruChalisa.title: Satguru Chalisa
satguruChalisa.caption: 🪔 Satguru Darshan
satguruChalisa.doha:
Poojaa Satguru charan kaa, kare nitya jo dhyaan |
Tere kripaa se jai Gurubande, sahaj usii kaa praan ||
satguruChalisa.p1_v1:
Jai jai jai Satguru jii devaa, karen jo maanav bhakti sevaa |
Sukh shaanti ghar satsaran aave, janam maran bhav rog nasaave ||
Mile bhaagya se Satguru daataa, raakhe jiiv se bhakti naataa |
Satguru naam jo bhitar gaave, adbhut tirath kaa phal paave ||
satguruChalisa.p1_v2:
Satguru dras rahe sukhdaai, janam janam kaa paap nasaai |
Satguru saran jiivan jo aave, Prabhu kaa pyaaraa so ban jaave ||
Satguru Raam ratan dhan khaani, daataa diin dayaalu daanii |
Saahib Satguru jiiv vidhaataa, aaye jagat bhaye vikhyaataa |
satguruChalisa.p2_v1:
Satguru bhagat bane jo koi, baal na baankaa uskaa hoi |
Raakhe jo Satguru ko aage, bhoot bhram sab dekhat bhaage ||
Jehi ghar Satguru kare nivaasaa, dete prem atal vishwaasaa |
Satguru naam akhand akaashaa, kare hriday mein param prakaashaa ||
satguruChalisa.p2_v2:
Satguru vachan hriday jo raakhaa, man mandir mein amrit chaakhaa |
Raakhe ek jo Satguru aashaa, amarlok ghar paave vaasaa ||
Satguru vaidya hai vachan davaai, saaraa maanas rog hataai |
Satguru mahimaa jaay na varni, jiiv ko taare mangal karni ||
satguruChalisa.p2_v3:
Satsang tirath jo maarat gotaa, man mailaa chit chaadar dhotaa |
Satguru ek hai samarth swaami, bhedi ghat kaa antaryaami ||
Sur nagar muni sansaar mein koi, bin Satguru bhav paar na hoi |
Jo Satguru pad dhyaan lagaai, ghat mein aatam gyaan samaai ||
satguruChalisa.p2_v4: Bin Satguru kaa jiiv hai nirguraa, Hari mile jo maanav saguraa |

satguruArti.title: Satguru Aarti
satguruArti.label: 🙏 Satguru Darshan
satguruArti.a1:
Aarti daas sada karen Prabhu ji, Satguru dwar tumhare |
Bina thaal kapoor deep ke, gagan dekh ujiyare ||

Virah se vyakul jaay wahan par, premi prem sahare |
Shabd dhvani sune soorati sudha ras, tan-man sudhi bisaare ||

Kar se kripa karen Swami ji, mile priyatam pyare |
Nij sukh wahan mile charanamut, man maya sab haare ||

Naam desh jahan noor nirantar, aatho pahar nihaare |
Gyaan ki Ganga bhakti ka saagar, jaaye hans milore ||

Jai Gurubande param purush Prabhu, santan ko gahi taare |
Alakh Anami Agam Agochar, Jai Gurubande hamaare ||
satguruArti.a2:
Aarti Satgurudev Prabhu ki, hoye barambar re manva Chal sache darbara |

Kaal akaal se mukti mile, Jai Gurubande paar re manva...

Brahma Vishnu Maheshwar, kar seva Kartaar re manva...

Kotin suraj chandra jahan, bhoomi pahaad hajaar re manva...

Noor desh jahan naam nirantar, bahta amrit dhaar re manva...

Parbrahm jahan Manasarovar, hanson ka sansaar re manva...

Bhavar gufa ki gupt gali mein, banshi ki jhankaar re manva...

Satlok ke prem nagar mein, hanson ki sarkar re manva...

Jai Gurubande Satguru Saheb, karte sabse pyaar re manva...
satguruArti.a3:
Akhand mandalakar jyoti, sam rahi Satlok |
Jeev dekhi Jai Gurubande, mite jagat ka shok ॥

Satguru bad Govind nahi nabh se pare kahaya |
Peechhe-peechhe Jai Gurubande, Hari milne ko bataya ॥

Sant samagam sabse achha mat bhatko manlaya |
Bhajate-bhajate Jai Gurubande, Hari darshan ko paaya ॥

dhyan.p1: Dhyan is a spiritual meditation practice that helps calm the mind and connect with inner peace. Through regular meditation sessions, participants learn to control their thoughts, reduce stress, and develop a deeper awareness of themselves.
dhyan.p2: The Dhyan program encourages individuals to build a daily meditation habit that promotes mental clarity, emotional balance, and spiritual growth. By practicing Dhyan regularly, participants experience improved concentration, inner stability, and a more positive outlook on life.
dhyan.p3: Our Dhyan sessions are designed to guide participants step-by-step through breathing techniques, mindfulness practices, and silent meditation. These practices help cultivate discipline, self-control, and a deeper connection with the inner self.
dhyan.p4: The goal of the Dhyan program is not only meditation but also personal transformation. With consistent practice, individuals can achieve peace of mind, stronger focus, and a balanced lifestyle that supports both spiritual and personal development.

blog.header_subtitle: Teachings, events & experiences from the sacred journey
blog.p1_d1: A sacred gathering was held where devotees wholeheartedly expressed their gratitude to Guruji for guiding them on their spiritual journey with wisdom, compassion, and blessings.
blog.p1_d2: The event included devotional songs, meditation sessions, and heartfelt offerings, creating a divine atmosphere filled with love and unity.
blog.p2_d1: An immersive retreat was organized in the serene ashram environment, filled with devotional songs, meditation, and discourses.
blog.p2_d2: The satsang inspired seekers to walk the path with clarity and remain grounded in faith and devotion.
blog.p3_d1: This was a soulful evening of bhajan and satsang where family, friends, and neighbors gathered to chant together, filling the atmosphere with divine vibrations.
blog.p3_d2: The chanting created collective energy that uplifted every participant, bringing deep inner peace.
blog.p4_d1: Devotees engaged in seva activities including cleanliness drives, food distribution, and helping the needy.
blog.p4_d2: These actions reminded everyone that service to mankind is true service to the Divine.
blog.p5_d1: A three-day meditation retreat was held to help seekers dive deep into silence and rejuvenate the mind.
blog.p5_d2: Participants experienced inner peace while being in the serene presence of Guruji.
blog.p6_d1: The ashram was decorated beautifully with diyas and flowers as devotees gathered for prayers, bhajans, and celebrations.
blog.p6_d2: The evening was filled with joy, love, and spiritual bliss.

testimonies.title: Testimonies of Grace
testimonies.subtitle: Real stories from devotees whose lives were touched by Guruji's blessings, satsangs, and the loving atmosphere of the ashram.
testimonies.cta_text: Have you felt Guruji's presence or received blessings in your life? You can share your story so that other devotees also feel inspired and hopeful.
testimonies.t1_short: For months I was worried about my health and mind. After visiting the ashram and doing satsang regularly, I felt a deep peace in my heart...
testimonies.t1_full: For months I was worried about my health and mind. After visiting the ashram and doing satsang regularly, I felt a deep peace in my heart. Guruji's blessings gave me strength to face my problems calmly. Within a short time, my reports improved and my family also felt happier and more connected. I now start my day with Guruji's name and feel guided in every decision.
testimonies.t2_short: I was very confused about my career and personal life. After one darshan at the ashram, things slowly started becoming clear for me...
testimonies.t2_full: I was very confused about my career and personal life. After one darshan at the ashram, things slowly started becoming clear for me. Through Guruji's satsangs and simple teachings on faith and hard work, I developed confidence and patience. I got a good job opportunity at the right time and my family relationships also healed. I truly feel Guruji arranged everything better than I imagined.
testimonies.t3_short: Earlier I used to overthink and stay stressed all the time. Regular bhajans and chanting brought a soft, silent joy inside me...
testimonies.t3_full: Earlier I used to overthink and stay stressed all the time. Regular bhajans and chanting brought a soft, silent joy inside me. I feel lighter, sleep better and handle daily challenges with a smile. The ashram became a second home where I can sit quietly, pray and feel Guruji's presence. This inner peace is the biggest blessing in my life.
testimonies.t4_short: Our family was going through financial and emotional problems together. After attending Guru Purnima at the ashram, a big change came...
testimonies.t4_full: Our family was going through financial and emotional problems. After attending Guru Purnima at the ashram, a big change came. Slowly, issues started resolving one by one. We received unexpected help, work started flowing, and there was more love and unity at home. We feel Guruji held our hand and walked us through a very difficult phase.

ashramLife.title: Ashram Life
ashramLife.intro: Ashram life is a sacred blend of devotion, discipline, simplicity, and selfless service. Every activity here is a form of sadhana, nurturing inner peace, humility, and spiritual growth.
ashramLife.c1_desc: Early morning prayer, meditation, and chanting to purify the mind and awaken devotion.
ashramLife.c2_desc: Listening to Guruji's teachings, scriptures, and Amritvani for self-realization.
ashramLife.c3_desc: Collective singing of divine bhajans to deepen love and surrender.
ashramLife.c4_desc: A serene closure of the day with gratitude, prayers, and remembrance of the Divine.
ashramLife.s1_desc: Cleaning, gardening, and maintaining the Ashram premises with devotion.
ashramLife.s2_desc: Preparing and serving food as an offering to all devotees.
ashramLife.s3_desc: Arranging satsangs, managing gatherings, and assisting devotees.
ashramLife.s4_desc: Helping society through charity, guidance, and spiritual outreach.
ashramLife.closing_p:
In Ashram life, seva is not duty — it is devotion.
Every act becomes a prayer, every moment a step towards self-realization.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to common questions about Guruji and the Ashram
faq.q1: Who is Guruji and what is Jai Gurubande?
faq.a1: Guruji, lovingly known as Jai Gurubande, is our divine guide and spiritual inspiration. He leads and blesses the community with his teachings, spreading positivity, devotion, and the path of seva (selfless service) and love.
faq.q2: How can I become part of the Jai Gurubande spiritual path?
faq.a2: You can become part of the Jai Gurubande spiritual path by staying connected with Guruji's teachings, joining satsangs and seva activities, following the official social channels, and participating in spiritual programs and events organized by the ashram.
faq.q3: What kind of activities are conducted under Ashram?
faq.a3: Under ashram, regular seva activities, satsangs, spiritual programs and events are conducted throughout the year. By Guruji's grace, free paralysis treatment is also offered at the ashram as a form of seva, along with online services such as spiritual resources, announcements, and updates.
faq.q4: Is there any fee or membership required?
faq.a4: No, joining with guruji is completely free. All you need is devotion and willingness to participate in ashram activities.
faq.q5: How can I get in touch for event-related queries?
faq.a5: All important contact details are shared in all programs page in the website and through our verified social media channel in Whatsapp.

contributeFAQ.title: Contribute – FAQ's
contributeFAQ.subtitle: Everything you need to know about contributing to the Ashram.

faqs.question: Why should I contribute to the Ashram?
faqs.answer: Your contribution supports spiritual activities, seva programs, annadanam, and the daily functioning of the Ashram.

faqs.question: How can I contribute?
faqs.answer: You can contribute through QR code scan, or by making a direct contribution at the Ashram.

faqs.question: Is online payment safe?
faqs.answer: Yes. All online contributions are processed through secure and trusted payment methods to ensure safety.

faqs.question: Can I contribute any amount?
faqs.answer: Yes. Contributions are accepted up to a maximum amount of ₹1,00,000. Any amount beyond this limit is not permitted. Every contribution within the allowed limit is accepted with gratitude and devotion.

faqs.question: Will I receive confirmation after contributing?
faqs.answer: After submitting your contribution, the details are saved securely in our system. You can check the status of your contribution anytime in the Check Payment Status page to see whether it has been reviewed and accepted or not.

ashramRules.hero_sub: To keep the atmosphere pure, peaceful and safe for everyone, we request all visitors to kindly follow these simple guidelines during their stay in the ashram.
dos: Come with faith, respect and an open heart.
Participate in seva and satsang sincerely.
Respect all devotees, sevadars and ashram staff.
donts: Do not bring alcohol, tobacco or non-vegetarian items.
Do not click disturbing / disrespectful photos or videos.
Do not argue, shout or create disturbance in ashram.
Do not damage any ashram property or plants.
ashramRules.summary_note: 🌺 By entering the ashram, you lovingly accept these guidelines and help maintain the sacred atmosphere for everyone.
ashramRules.cta_sub: Your support in following these guidelines allows every devotee to experience peace, devotion and joy in the ashram. We look forward to welcoming you with love and respect.
ashramRules.cta_btn: I have read & understood the guidelines

sections.title: Before You Visit
points: Plan your visit in advance, especially on Purnima, festivals, and special programs.
Inform the ashram team if you are coming in a large group or need help with stay / food.
Bring a valid ID proof if you are staying overnight in ashram accommodation.
Avoid bringing valuables, heavy jewellery or large amounts of cash.

sections.title: Dress Code & Appearance
points: Wear simple, modest and comfortable clothes (preferably traditional / light-coloured).
Avoid sleeveless, tight, transparent or very short dresses.
Please keep a clean and fresh appearance as a mark of respect to the ashram and Guru.
Remove caps, sunglasses etc. inside the main temple / satsang hall.

sections.title: Silence & Discipline
points: Maintain silence in and around the main temple and meditation areas.
Keep your mobile on silent or switch off; avoid taking calls inside the temple.
Avoid loud talking, arguments, or disturbing behaviour in ashram premises.
Follow the instructions of sevadars, volunteers and ashram staff politely.

sections.title: Seva & Participation
points: Participate in seva (service) like cleaning, helping in prasad / bhandara, arranging mats etc.
Do seva with a humble heart, without ego or expectation.
If you have any health issues, choose light seva suitable for your body.
Children and youth are encouraged to join seva under adult supervision.

sections.title: Prasad & Food Etiquette
points: Langar / prasad is served as per ashram timings. Please cooperate with the schedule.
Avoid wasting food and water. Take only as much as you can eat.
Do not bring non-vegetarian food, alcohol, tobacco or any intoxicants into the ashram.
Chewing tobacco, smoking and alcohol consumption are strictly prohibited.

sections.title: Photography & Social Media
points: Respect the sanctity of the place while taking photos or videos.
Avoid flash photography inside the temple / during meditations.
Do not disturb others' meditation or darshan for the sake of photos.
Before posting on social media, share respectful content only.

sections.title: Stay & Accommodation Rules
points: Use ashram rooms and beds with care; keep your area neat and clean.
Follow check-in and check-out timings given by the ashram office.
Male and female devotees are allotted separate accommodation as per rules.
Lights-out time should be respected so that others can rest peacefully.

sections.title: Cleanliness & Environment
points: Use dustbins for all waste; do not litter anywhere in the ashram.
Keep toilets and bathrooms clean for the next person.
Use water mindfully; avoid unnecessary wastage.
Protect plants, trees and ashram property. Do not pluck flowers without permission.

sections.title: Safety & Emergency
points: Report any medical emergency immediately to the nearest sevadar / office.
Children should remain with parents/guardians; do not leave them unattended.
Do not enter restricted areas or climb on walls / railings.
In case of any confusion, always contact the ashram help desk.
